title: × brassocattleya araguaiensis
intro: × Brassocattleya araguaiensis is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Brassia and Cattleya orchids. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. × Brassocattleya araguaiensis is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
